spec_match.rationale: The demo now uses real constrained editable title and URL inputs with text-overflow: ellipsis, matching the spec's interaction model for editing and caret navigation.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP exercised the search bar, preset buttons, search action, editable result title, and caret-to-end control in Canary with clean readouts.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now delivers the promised search results list where titles and URLs are editable fields rather than static overflowing text.

edge_cases.rationale: The repaired UI covers idle ellipsis, focused editing, typing, caret movement to the hidden end, URL fields, title fields, and mobile-width card wrapping.

references.rationale: The concept includes direct links to ChromeStatus #5146265241387008 and the CSS Overflow 3 ellipsis-interaction section.

design_system.rationale: The patch uses shared CSS variables, fixes the focused badge contrast, constrains grid children with minmax/min-width, and avoids nested card layouts.

summary: The search-results concept has editable constrained title and URL fields and now has the required browser evidence. Chrome DevTools MCP in Headless Chrome Canary 151 verified preset loading, search action, editable result title focus, caret-to-end status, named generated inputs, clean console, and the feature conformance route at 9 pass / 0 fail.
